html:
TL;DR

  • Nov 21 2021, 12:56am Apple Note titled "." (single period). Body is a stray character b; plus an Apple com.apple.drawing.2 attachment reference — the actual sketch didn't survive export. Pure drawing-orphan subtype.
  • Created late-night during OSU freshman fall finals run-up (3-min modify window). Whatever Yahir drew is gone; only the metadata pointer remains.
  • Title-as-period is the most-minimal version of the title-as-content move — zero signal title, paired with a now-lost visual. Sibling form to other empty-body / orphan-attachment entries surfaced in slice 4.
  • Graph value: another data point reinforcing the drawing-orphan as a recurring subtype — Apple Notes' lossy export pipeline (no inline image embedding) has eaten dozens of late-night sketches across the corpus.

Source quote

b;
$0D2BB150-ECF9-4F50-A279-2B952304B582com.apple.drawing.2

Open questions

  • Recoverable from iCloud / device if Yahir wanted to back-fill the drawing? Probably yes via the live Notes app if the note still exists on his phone.
  • Pattern check: how many com.apple.drawing.* orphans across the full corpus? Worth a densify-pass tally as evidence for an export-tooling fix in osascript as export tool.

Wikilinks

osascript as export tool · osu · recording as note
